allow: PowerShell(python -c "import numpy, scipy, sklearn; print\('numpy', numpy.__version__\); print\('scipy', scipy.__version__\); print\('sklearn', sklearn.__version__\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import numpy, scipy; print\('numpy', numpy.__version__\); print\('scipy', scipy.__version__\)"; python --version)

PowerShell(python -c "import streamlit; print\('streamlit', streamlit.__version__\)"; python -c "import pydeck; print\('pydeck', pydeck.__version__\)"; python -c "import pandas; print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\)")

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/_stcore/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "HEALTH: $\($r.Content\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "no health yet" })

PowerShell(python -m py_compile app.py model.py; if \($?\) { Write-Output "compile OK" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/_stcore/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "server health: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "server down" })
PowerShell(python -c "import fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic; print\('fastapi', fastapi.__version__, '| uvicorn', uvicorn.__version__, '| pydantic', pydantic.__version__\)")

PowerShell($env:BROWSER="none"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","streamlit","run","app.py","--server.headless=true","--server.port=8766","--browser.gatherUsageStats=false" -RedirectStandardOutput "_st2_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "_st2_err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; $ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 25; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8766/_stcore/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "HEALTH: $\($r.Content\)"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "no health" })
